def negative_composition_candidate_for_optional_behavior_implemented_as_inheritance():
    rule_id = "composition_candidate_for_optional_behavior_implemented_as_inheritance"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag optional behavior modeled through inheritance when composition would isolate concerns better."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
